meaning: n.狭域生态学(一门研究小块地区生态的学科)
examples: The research on the microecology of fish was much less in-depth than that on mammalian.
Objective: To study the alteration in the intestinal microecology in the infants with rotavirus enteritis.
Guided by the theory of animal microecology, Bacillus cereus microecology preparation used in rabbits was developed and studied in this research.
